name: Tempura Green Beans, Yellow Beans and Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a blender. Add 1 3/4 cups of water and blend until smooth.
2. Transfer the batter to a shallow dish.
3. Whisk together soy sauce, lime juice, wasabi paste, and dried crushed red pepper in a small bowl.
4. Cut tofu into 1/2-inch-wide slices, then cut each slice into 1/2-inch-wide logs. Place tofu on several layers of paper towels. Cover with paper towels. Let stand for 1 hour.
5. Heat oil in a heavy large Dutch oven to 375°F (190°C). Working in batches, dip beans into the batter, shaking off excess, and add them to the hot oil. Fry until golden, stirring often, about 3 minutes per batch. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the beans to paper towels; drain.
6. Repeat with tofu and batter. Serve beans and tofu with sauce.
Notes:
A lime and soy dipping sauce accompanies this appetizer from A Pacific Cafe in Kapaa, on the Hawaiian Island of Kauai. Wasabi (horseradish) paste is sold at Japanese markets and some supermarkets.
